LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T51_Power_Armor.desc: Mal en T-51 kraftrustning med Appalachia Brotherhood Appalachia-farger.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T51_Power_Armor.labe: maling T-51 power armor Appalachia kapittel
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T60_Power_Armor.desc: Mal en T-60 kraftrustning med Appalachia Brotherhood Appalachia-farger.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor.descripti: Mal en T-45 kraftrustning med Lyons Pride Brotherhood of Steel-farger.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor.label: maling T-45 power armor (Lyons Pride)
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Outcast_Power_Armor.descrip: Mal en T-45 kraftrustning med Outcast Brotherhood of Steel-farger.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Outcast_Power_Armor.label: maling T-45 power armor (Outcast)
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor.description: Mal en T-51 kraftrustning med standard Brotherhood Appalachia-farger.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor.label: maling T-51 power armor Appalachia kapittel
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor.description: Mal en T-60 kraftrustning med standard Brotherhood Appalachia-farger.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor.label: maling T-60 kraftpanser Appalachia kapittel
